files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 9312204..704fd13 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -329,2 +329,8 @@ Day 329 / Week 47 observations:
 - 999 new enterprise leads were reported, but the latest-thread query found 2,109 system-latest rows. The send call accepted 999, matching the dashboard; treat the rest as stale/non-actionable. Enterprise remains 0 seats.
 - Week 47 adjustment: cut support to global ops $60k/day plus S2 ops $180k/day and S1 $5k/day, pause global and targeted dev, stop S2 content ad spend, reduce S2 B/C credits to $10 while keeping A credit $10, and hold A3/B3/C4 with large quotas.
+
+Day 336 / Week 48 observations:
+- Cash stabilized slightly at $1.94M, but subscribers fell to 122,909. Cancellations rose to 7,346 and open issues rose to 9,373.
+- Latest churn shifted heavily to S2 C (3,626), with S2 A (2,601) and B (1,822) also significant. Cutting C credits was too aggressive.
+- 876 new enterprise leads were reported; the query found 1,986 system-latest rows and the send call accepted 876, again matching the dashboard.
+- Week 48 adjustment: restore S2 C credit to $20, raise S2 A credit to $15, keep S2 B credit at $10, modestly increase ops to global $70k/day and S2 $200k/day plus S1 $5k/day, keep dev/ad spend paused, and hold A3/B3/C4 with large quotas.
